arts.ttl: Which Arsenal games will Leandro Trossard miss after Man City red?
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at the Arsenal games that Leandro Trossard will miss after his red card against Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville explains why Pep Guardiola was furious seconds after Arsenal goal vs Man City
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola was left livid after Ricardo Calafiori's goal for Arsenal and even kicked his own chair in the dugout - as the City players also fumed at the referee over the position of the Gunners' free-kick

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta's reaction moments after Leandro Trossard red card speaks volumes
arts.sum: Leandro Trossard was shown his second yellow card after booting away the ball, having been judged to have fouled Bernardo Silva in the first half of Arsenal's clash against Manchester City

arts.ttl: Why Man City were furious with Arsenal equaliser in fiery Premier League battle
arts.sum: Michael Oliver is taking charge of a lively Man City v Arsenal meeting in the Premier League, and Gary Neville says he would be 'annoyed' in Kyle Walker's shoes with one incident

arts.ttl: Why Leandro Trossard was sent off in Premier League game vs Man City as Arsenal fume
arts.sum: Arsenal were reduced to 10 men late in the first half of their Premier League game against Manchester City

arts.ttl: Man City vs. Arsenal: Haaland hits new landmark, equals Cristiano Ronaldo record
arts.sum: Erling Haaland scores his 100th Manchester City goal, equalling the record set by Cristiano Ronaldo as the fastest to reach that milestone this century.

arts.ttl: Why was Arsenal’s Leandro Trossard sent off against Manchester City?
arts.sum: The Gunners were reduced to 10 men against the champions when Trossard was shown a second yellow card just before half-time

arts.ttl: Arsenal: Premier League explain ‘stupid’ Leandro Trossard red card against Man City
arts.sum: Trossard was sent off by referee Michael Oliver when he was given a second yellow card at the Etihad

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans fume after Trossard red card
arts.sum: Arsenal fans have expressed their anger at Michael Oliver after Leandro Trossard was shown a second yellow card in first-half stoppage time against Manchester City . The Belgian international was adjudged to have fouled Bernardo Silva, but he received a second booking for delaying the restart by kicking the ball away.

arts.ttl: Man City players FUME at referee Michael Oliver for letting Arsenal's equaliser stand after he pulled Kyle Walker out of position before a quick free-kick led to goal
arts.sum: Kyle Walker and his Manchester City team-mates were left fuming at referee Michael Oliver as Arsenal equalised in Sunday's huge Premier League clash at the Etihad.
